col.label: 实发存量维护薪酬总额
应发提成绩效薪酬总额

select.value: select vl.MEASURE_DT ,vl.EXAM_YEAR ,vl.EXAM_Q ,vl.BRANCH_ORG_ID ,vl.BRANCH_ORG_NM ,vl.BZJX ,vl.ACT_JX ,vl.DX_XZ ,vl.EXS_BZJX_SUM ,vl.DIS_SCORE ,vl.EXS_XZ ,ou.HEAD_ORG_ID ,coalesce(pro.LN_Q_PROFIT,0) as ZC_FTP ,coalesce(pro.DEP_Q_PROFIT,0) AS FZ_FTP ,coalesce(mid.INCOME,0) AS MID_INC ,(vl.ACT_JX-vl.DX_XZ-vl.EXS_BZJX_SUM+vl.DIS_SCORE) AS COM_JX ,(case when coalesce(pro.LN_Q_PROFIT,0)+coalesce(pro.DEP_Q_PROFIT,0)+coalesce(mid.INCOME,0)=0 then 0 else (vl.ACT_JX-vl.DX_XZ-vl.EXS_BZJX_SUM+vl.DIS_SCORE)/(coalesce(pro.LN_Q_PROFIT,0)+coalesce(pro.DEP_Q_PROFIT,0)+coalesce(mid.INCOME,0))*100 end) as COM_RATION from ibs.T3_BRANCH_EXS_XZ_VAL vl left join ( select sy.MEASURE_DT,sy.BRANCH_ORG_ID,sy.BRANCH_ORG_NM ,sum(sy.DEP_Q_PROFIT) as DEP_Q_PROFIT ,sum(case when NEW_OR_EXIST='新增' then sy.LN_Q_PROFIT else 0 end) as LN_Q_PROFIT from ibs.T2_EMP_DEP_LN_PROFIT_SMY sy inner join ibs.T5_EMP_Q em on em.MEASURE_DT=sy.MEASURE_DT and em.EMP_ID=sy.EMP_ID and em.PSTN_TYPE='04' and em.EMP_ID not like '1%' where sy.MEASURE_DT = {#EXAM_YEAR#}||(case {#EXAM_Q#} when '01' then '-03-31' when '02' then '-06-30' when '03' then '-09-30' when '04' then '-12-31' else '' end) group by sy.MEASURE_DT,sy.BRANCH_ORG_ID,sy.BRANCH_ORG_NM )pro on pro.BRANCH_ORG_ID=vl.BRANCH_ORG_ID and pro.MEASURE_DT=vl.MEASURE_DT left join( select inc.MEASURE_DT, inc.BRANCH_ORG_ID, sum(inc.INCOME) as INCOME from IBS.T1_MIDDLE_BUSINESS_INCOME inc inner join ibs.T5_EMP_Q em on em.MEASURE_DT=inc.MEASURE_DT and em.EMP_ID=inc.EMP_ID and em.PSTN_TYPE='04' and em.EMP_ID not like '1%' where inc.MEASURE_DT ={#EXAM_YEAR#}||(case {#EXAM_Q#} when '01' then '-03-31' when '02' then '-06-30' when '03' then '-09-30' when '04' then '-12-31' else '' end) group by inc.MEASURE_DT, inc.BRANCH_ORG_ID )mid on mid.MEASURE_DT=pro.MEASURE_DT and mid.BRANCH_ORG_ID=pro.BRANCH_ORG_ID inner join (select distinct BRANCH_ORG_ID,BRANCH_ORG_NM, HEAD_ORG_ID from ibs.T5_ORG where ORG_TYPE_ID='EO') ou on ou.BRANCH_ORG_ID=vl.BRANCH_ORG_ID where {#condition#} ORDER by vl.EXAM_YEAR DESC,vl.EXAM_Q DESC,vl.BRANCH_ORG_ID

option.source: @{SELECT DISTINCT BRANCH_ORG_ID , CASE WHEN ORG_LEVEL_ID='2' THEN BRANCH_ORG_NM ELSE BRANCH_ORG_NM||'机关' END AS BRANCH_ORG_NM FROM IBS.T5_ORG WHERE ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' AND ORG_LEVEL_ID IN ('2','3') and (ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#' or HEAD_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#') ORDER BY BRANCH_ORG_ID}
option.label: BRANCH_ORG_NM
